title: Saguaster oninensis
intro:
I couldn't find any information on a plant called Saguaster oninensis. However, I found a plant called Saurauia oninensis (also known as Saguaster oninensis), which seems to be an alternative name.

Saurauia oninensis, or Saguaster oninensis, is a plant species that belongs to the family Actinidiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and inflammation, due to its potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Saurauia oninensis is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are the most common preparations made with this plant.

side_effects: Saguaster oninensis, also known as Chinese Angelica, has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, but its long-term use may cause some side effects. These side effects include gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and stomach upset, due to its high coumarin content. Prolonged use may also lead to interactions with other medications, such as blood thinners.
